# ai-food-assistant
AI-powered restaurant recommendation website using Google Sheets data and scoring system for restaurant selection.
[AI-Food-Decision-Report-Thonglor Genniga.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/28701299/AI-Food-Decision-Report-Thonglor.Genniga.html)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="th">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>AI Food Decision Report — ทองหล่อ</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Instrument+Serif:ital@0;1&family=Syne:wght@400;600;700;800&family=Noto+Sans+Thai:wght@300;400;500;600&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<style>
/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   TOKENS
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
:root{
  --black:  #f7f2ea;
  --ink:    #faf6ef;
  --ink-2:  #f0e9de;
  --ink-3:  #e5dbd0;
  --rule:   rgba(120,85,50,.12);
  --rule-2: rgba(120,85,50,.07);
  --white:  #2d1f10;
  --muted:  #8a6e54;
  --dim:    #c4aa92;
  --orange: #8b4513;
  --orange-l: rgba(139,69,19,.12);
  --orange-g: rgba(139,69,19,.06);
  --green:  #4a7c59;
  --green-l: rgba(74,124,89,.12);
  --amber:  #a0622a;
  --amber-l: rgba(160,98,42,.12);
  --red:    #a03030;
  --red-l:  rgba(160,48,48,.1);
  --blue:   #3d6b8e;
  --blue-l: rgba(61,107,142,.1);
  --radius: 8px;
  --mono: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  --serif: 'Instrument Serif', 'Noto Serif Thai', serif;
  --sans: 'Syne', 'Noto Sans Thai', sans-serif;
  --body: 'Noto Sans Thai', 'Syne', sans-serif;
}

*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}

body{
  background:var(--black);
  color:var(--white);
  font-family:var(--body);
  font-size:13px;
  line-height:1.6;
  -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   GRAIN OVERLAY
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
body::before{
  content:'';
  position:fixed;inset:0;
  background-image:url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 256 256' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='.9' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)' opacity='.04'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
  pointer-events:none;z-index:0;opacity:.15;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   LAYOUT WRAPPER
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
.page{
  max-width:960px;
  margin:0 auto;
  padding:0 24px 64px;
  position:relative;z-index:1;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   TOP BAR
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
.topbar{
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
  padding:18px 0 16px;
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--rule);
  gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;
}
.topbar-brand{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;
}
.ai-dot{
  width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;
  background:var(--orange);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;
  font-family:var(--mono);
  flex-shrink:0;
  box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(139,69,19,.3);
  animation:pulse 2.5s ease-in-out infinite;
}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(139,69,19,.3)}50%{box-shadow:0 2px 18px rgba(139,69,19,.5)}}
.brand-name{
  font-family:var(--sans);font-size:13px;font-weight:700;
  letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--white);
}
.brand-name span{color:var(--orange)}
.topbar-meta{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:20px;flex-wrap:wrap;
}
.meta-item{
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);
  letter-spacing:.04em;
}
.meta-item strong{color:var(--white);font-weight:500}
.meta-sep{color:var(--dim);font-size:10px}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   HERO
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
.hero{
  padding:52px 0 40px;
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--rule);
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto;gap:32px;align-items:end;
}
.hero-label{
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;
  letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--orange);margin-bottom:16px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
}
.hero-label::before{
  content:'';display:block;width:20px;height:1px;background:var(--orange);
}
.hero-title{
  font-family:var(--serif);
  font-size:clamp(38px,6vw,68px);
  font-weight:400;line-height:1.05;
  letter-spacing:-.02em;
  margin-bottom:8px;
}
.hero-title em{font-style:italic;color:var(--orange)}
.hero-sub{
  font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);
  font-weight:300;max-width:480px;line-height:1.7;
  margin-top:16px;
}
.hero-sub strong{color:var(--white);font-weight:500}
.hero-kpi{
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px;align-items:flex-end;
}
.kpi-block{text-align:right}
.kpi-num{
  font-family:var(--serif);font-size:44px;
  font-weight:400;line-height:1;color:var(--white);
}
.kpi-label{
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.1em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   SECTION HEADER
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
.sec-header{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;
  padding:28px 0 18px;
}
.sec-num{
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--orange);
  letter-spacing:.08em;flex-shrink:0;
}
.sec-title{
  font-family:var(--sans);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;
  letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--white);
}
.sec-rule{flex:1;height:1px;background:var(--rule)}
.sec-count{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--dim)}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   RECOMMENDATION GRID (TOP 3)
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
.rec-grid{
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;
  gap:12px;margin-bottom:4px;
}
.rec-card{
  background:var(--ink-2);
  border:1px solid var(--rule);
  border-radius:var(--radius);
  padding:0;
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;
  transition:border-color .2s;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;
}
.rec-card:hover{border-color:rgba(120,85,50,.3)}
.rec-card.first{border-top:2px solid var(--orange)}
.rec-card.second{border-top:2px solid var(--muted)}
.rec-card.third{border-top:2px solid #7a5020}

.rec-photo{
  width:100%;height:180px;object-fit:cover;
  display:block;flex-shrink:0;
}
.rec-card-body{
  padding:20px;position:relative;flex:1;
}
.rec-rank{
  font-family:var(--serif);font-size:52px;
  font-weight:400;line-height:1;
  margin-bottom:14px;
  opacity:.9;
}
.first .rec-rank{color:var(--orange)}
.second .rec-rank{color:var(--muted)}
.third .rec-rank{color:#7a5020}

.rec-composite{
  position:absolute;top:14px;right:14px;
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;
  padding:3px 8px;border-radius:4px;
  background:var(--ink-3);color:var(--muted);
  border:1px solid var(--rule);
}
.first .rec-composite{color:var(--orange);border-color:var(--orange-l)}

.rec-name{
  font-family:var(--sans);font-size:13px;font-weight:700;
  line-height:1.3;margin-bottom:4px;color:var(--white);
}
.rec-cuisine{
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;
  color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.04em;
  margin-bottom:14px;
}
.rec-score-row{
  display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px;
}
.rec-rating{
  font-family:var(--serif);font-size:26px;color:var(--white);
}
.rec-stars{font-size:11px;color:var(--amber)}
.rec-reviews{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--muted)}

.rec-tags{display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:12px}
.tag{
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;
  padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;
  border:1px solid var(--rule);color:var(--muted);
}
.tag-orange{border-color:var(--orange-l);color:var(--orange);background:var(--orange-g)}
.tag-green{border-color:rgba(74,124,89,.25);color:var(--green);background:var(--green-l)}

.rec-reason{
  font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);
  line-height:1.6;border-left:1px solid var(--rule);
  padding-left:10px;
}
.rec-price{
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;
  color:var(--green);margin-top:10px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;
}
.rec-price::before{content:'฿ ';opacity:.5}
.rec-phone{
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--dim);
  margin-top:6px;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   FULL TABLE
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
.filter-strip{
  display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:14px;
}
.fb{
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;
  padding:5px 12px;border-radius:4px;
  border:1px solid var(--rule);
  background:transparent;color:var(--muted);
  cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;letter-spacing:.04em;
}
.fb:hover{border-color:rgba(120,85,50,.25);color:var(--white)}
.fb.on{background:var(--orange);border-color:var(--orange);color:#fff}

.tbl-wrap{
  border:1px solid var(--rule);border-radius:var(--radius);
  overflow:hidden;overflow-x:auto;
}
table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:11px}
thead tr{background:var(--ink-2)}
th{
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.1em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);
  padding:10px 10px;text-align:center;
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--rule);white-space:nowrap;
  font-weight:500;
}
th:first-child{text-align:left;padding-left:14px}
td{
  padding:9px 10px;
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--rule-2);
  text-align:center;vertical-align:middle;
  color:var(--muted);
}
td:first-child{text-align:left;padding-left:14px;color:var(--white)}
tbody tr:hover{background:var(--ink-2)}
tbody tr.top{background:rgba(139,69,19,.05)}
tbody tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none}

.rk{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:4px;
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;font-weight:500;
  margin-right:8px;vertical-align:middle;flex-shrink:0;
}
.rk1{background:var(--orange-l);color:var(--orange);border:1px solid rgba(139,69,19,.3)}
.rk2{background:rgba(120,85,50,.08);color:var(--muted);border:1px solid var(--rule)}
.rk3{background:rgba(120,80,30,.1);color:#7a5020;border:1px solid rgba(120,80,30,.25)}
.rkn{background:transparent;color:var(--dim);border:1px solid var(--rule-2)}

.bar-cell{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;justify-content:center}
.bar{height:4px;width:52px;background:var(--ink-3);border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden}
.bar-f{height:100%;border-radius:2px}
.bv{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;min-width:22px}

.sp{
  display:inline-block;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:4px;
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.04em;
  font-weight:600;
}
.sp-rec{background:var(--green-l);color:var(--green)}
.sp-con{background:var(--blue-l);color:var(--blue)}
.sp-sec{background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);color:var(--dim)}
.sp-no{background:var(--red-l);color:var(--red)}

.ptag{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;font-weight:600}
.p1{color:var(--green)}.p2{color:rgba(255,255,255,.4)}.p3{color:var(--amber)}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   FACTOR GRID
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
.factor-grid{
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);
  gap:10px;
}
.fc{
  background:var(--ink-2);border:1px solid var(--rule);
  border-radius:var(--radius);padding:16px 14px;
}
.fc-head{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:4px}
.fc-icon{font-size:14px}
.fc-label{font-family:var(--sans);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#3d1f0a}
.fc-desc{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;color:#8a6e54;margin-bottom:12px;line-height:1.4}
.fc-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:4px}
.fc-name{
  font-size:10px;color:#7a5c3e;
  flex:0 0 82px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;
}
.fc-track{flex:1;height:4px;background:var(--ink-3);border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden}
.fc-fill{height:100%;border-radius:2px;transition:width .8s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1)}
.fc-val{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;color:#8a6e54;min-width:22px;text-align:right}
.top1-tag{
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:8px;padding:1px 4px;
  border-radius:3px;background:var(--orange-l);color:var(--orange);
  margin-right:3px;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   DQ LOG
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
.dq-row{
  display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:12px;
  padding:10px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--rule-2);
}
.dq-row:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.dq-badge{
  flex-shrink:0;width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:6px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;font-weight:700;
}
.dq-h{background:var(--red-l);color:var(--red)}
.dq-m{background:var(--amber-l);color:var(--amber)}
.dq-l{background:var(--green-l);color:var(--green)}
.dq-title{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:2px}
.dq-desc{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.5}
.dq-src{
  margin-left:auto;align-self:center;flex-shrink:0;
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;padding:3px 8px;
  border-radius:4px;background:var(--ink-3);color:var(--dim);
  white-space:nowrap;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   METHODOLOGY / WORKFLOW / LIMITATIONS
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
.method-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:12px;margin-bottom:4px}
.method-card{
  background:var(--ink-2);border:1px solid var(--rule);
  border-radius:var(--radius);padding:20px;
}
.method-card-head{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:12px}
.method-icon{
  width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:8px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-size:16px;flex-shrink:0;
}
.method-card-head h3{font-family:var(--sans);font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#3d1f0a}
.method-step{display:flex;gap:10px;margin-bottom:9px;align-items:flex-start}
.ms-num{
  width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;font-weight:700;margin-top:1px;
}
.ms-text{font-size:11px;color:#7a5c3e;line-height:1.55}
.ms-text strong{color:#3d1f0a;font-weight:500}

/* AI Workflow timeline */
.workflow-wrap{
  background:#f0e9de;border:1px solid var(--rule);
  border-radius:var(--radius);padding:24px;overflow-x:auto;
}
.workflow-track{
  display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:0;
  min-width:720px;position:relative;
}
.workflow-track::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;top:20px;left:0;right:0;height:1px;
  background:linear-gradient(to right,#7a3b0e,rgba(120,85,50,.15) 90%);
  z-index:0;
}
.wf-node{
  flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;
  position:relative;z-index:1;padding:0 6px;
}
.wf-dot{
  width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-size:15px;border:2px solid rgba(120,85,50,.2);
  background:#faf6ef;margin-bottom:10px;
  transition:border-color .2s;
}
.wf-node.active .wf-dot{border-color:#7a3b0e;background:rgba(122,59,14,.1)}
.wf-label{
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.05em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:#7a5c3e;text-align:center;
  line-height:1.4;margin-bottom:3px;font-weight:600;
}
.wf-desc{font-size:10px;color:#8a6e54;text-align:center;line-height:1.4}
.wf-tool{
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;padding:2px 6px;
  border-radius:3px;background:rgba(122,59,14,.1);color:#7a3b0e;
  border:1px solid rgba(122,59,14,.2);margin-top:5px;
}
.wf-arrow{
  align-self:center;font-size:14px;color:#c4aa92;
  flex-shrink:0;padding:0 2px;margin-top:-20px;
}

/* Limitations */
.limit-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px}
.limit-item{
  display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start;
  background:var(--ink-2);border:1px solid var(--rule);
  border-radius:var(--radius);padding:14px 16px;
}
.limit-badge{
  flex-shrink:0;width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:8px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-size:13px;
}
.limit-body h4{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:3px}
.limit-body p{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.55}
.limit-suggest{
  font-size:10px;font-family:var(--mono);color:var(--orange);
  margin-top:5px;padding-top:5px;border-top:1px solid var(--rule);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   FOOTER
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
.footer{
  margin-top:48px;
  padding-top:20px;border-top:1px solid var(--rule);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
  flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px;
}
.footer-left{
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;color:var(--dim);
  letter-spacing:.06em;line-height:1.7;
}
.footer-left strong{color:var(--muted)}
.footer-badge{
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;
  padding:5px 12px;border-radius:4px;
  background:var(--ink-2);border:1px solid var(--rule);
  color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.04em;
}
.footer-badge span{color:var(--orange)}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   PRINT
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
@media print{
  body::before{display:none}
  .filter-strip{display:none}
  .ai-dot{animation:none;box-shadow:none}
  .page{padding:0 0 32px}
}
@media(max-width:700px){
  .rec-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .factor-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
  .hero{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .hero-kpi{flex-direction:row;align-items:center}
  table th:nth-child(n+6),table td:nth-child(n+6){display:none}
}

/* ── MODAL ── */
.modal-overlay{
  display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:1000;
  background:rgba(45,31,16,.6);backdrop-filter:blur(6px);
  align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:20px;
}
.modal-overlay.open{display:flex}
.modal{
  background:#faf6ef;border-radius:16px;
  width:100%;max-width:640px;max-height:90vh;
  overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;
  box-shadow:0 24px 64px rgba(45,31,16,.3);
  animation:modalIn .25s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1);
}
@keyframes modalIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(20px) scale(.97)}to{opacity:1;transform:none}}
.modal-photos{
  width:100%;height:220px;background:var(--bg2);
  display:flex;gap:3px;overflow:hidden;flex-shrink:0;position:relative;
}
.modal-photo-main{
  flex:1;height:100%;object-fit:cover;
  background:var(--bg3);display:block;
}
.modal-photo-side{
  width:130px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:3px;flex-shrink:0;
}
.modal-photo-side img{
  flex:1;width:100%;object-fit:cover;
  background:var(--bg3);display:block;
}
.photo-placeholder{
  flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;
  align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  background:var(--bg2);font-size:32px;gap:6px;
}
.photo-placeholder span{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;color:var(--muted)}
.modal-rank-badge{
  position:absolute;top:12px;left:12px;
  font-family:var(--serif);font-size:22px;font-weight:400;
  width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:50%;
  background:rgba(250,246,239,.92);backdrop-filter:blur(4px);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  color:#7a3b0e;box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(45,31,16,.2);
}
.modal-body{padding:22px 24px 24px;overflow-y:auto;flex:1}
.modal-close{
  position:absolute;top:12px;right:12px;
  width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;
  background:rgba(250,246,239,.9);border:none;cursor:pointer;
  font-size:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  color:var(--muted);z-index:10;
  transition:background .15s;
}
.modal-close:hover{background:#fff;color:var(--ink)}
.modal-header{margin-bottom:14px}
.modal-name{
  font-family:var(--serif);font-size:24px;font-weight:400;
  color:#2d1f10;line-height:1.2;margin-bottom:4px;
}
.modal-cuisine-tag{
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);
  letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;
}
.modal-score-row{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;
  padding:12px 0;border-top:1px solid var(--border);
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);margin-bottom:14px;
  flex-wrap:wrap;
}
.modal-score-item{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px;align-items:center}
.modal-score-big{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:28px;color:#2d1f10;line-height:1}
.modal-score-lbl{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase}
.modal-stars{font-size:13px;color:#a0622a}
.modal-sep{width:1px;height:36px;background:var(--border);align-self:center}
.modal-composite{
  font-family:var(--serif);font-size:22px;font-weight:400;
}
.modal-detail{
  font-size:12px;color:#7a5c3e;line-height:1.7;
  margin-bottom:16px;
  padding:10px 12px;background:rgba(122,59,14,.05);
  border-radius:8px;border-left:3px solid rgba(122,59,14,.2);
}
.modal-info-grid{
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;
  margin-bottom:16px;
}
.modal-info-item{
  background:#f0e9de;border-radius:8px;
  padding:10px 12px;
}
.modal-info-lbl{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:3px}
.modal-info-val{font-size:12px;color:#2d1f10;font-weight:500;word-break:break-all}
.modal-actions{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.modal-btn{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;
  padding:8px 16px;border-radius:8px;
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;font-weight:500;
  text-decoration:none;cursor:pointer;
  border:1px solid rgba(120,85,50,.2);
  background:transparent;color:#4a3220;
  transition:all .15s;letter-spacing:.03em;
}
.modal-btn:hover{background:#f0e9de;border-color:#a0622a;color:#7a3b0e}
.modal-btn-primary{
  background:#7a3b0e;border-color:#7a3b0e;color:#fff;
}
.modal-btn-primary:hover{background:#5c2b0a;border-color:#5c2b0a;color:#fff}

/* clickable rows/cards */
tbody tr{cursor:pointer}
.rec-card{cursor:pointer}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ── RESTAURANT MODAL ──────────────────── -->
<div class="modal-overlay" id="modal-overlay" onclick="closeModalOverlay(event)">
  <div class="modal" id="modal">
    <div class="modal-photos" id="modal-photos">
      <div class="photo-placeholder" id="photo-placeholder" style="flex:1">
        <span style="font-size:48px">🍽️</span>
        <span>กำลังโหลดรูปภาพ…</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal()">✕</button>
    <div class="modal-body">
      <div class="modal-header">
        <div class="modal-name" id="modal-name"></div>
        <div class="modal-cuisine-tag" id="modal-cuisine"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="modal-score-row">
        <div class="modal-score-item">
          <div class="modal-score-big" id="modal-rating"></div>
          <div class="modal-stars" id="modal-stars"></div>
          <div class="modal-score-lbl">Google Rating</div>
        </div>
        <div class="modal-sep"></div>
        <div class="modal-score-item">
          <div class="modal-score-big" id="modal-reviews"></div>
          <div class="modal-score-lbl">รีวิว</div>
        </div>
        <div class="modal-sep"></div>
        <div class="modal-score-item">
          <div class="modal-composite" id="modal-composite"></div>
          <div class="modal-score-lbl">คะแนนรวม</div>
        </div>
        <div class="modal-sep"></div>
        <div class="modal-score-item">
          <div class="modal-score-big" id="modal-price"></div>
          <div class="modal-score-lbl">ราคา/หัว</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="modal-detail" id="modal-detail"></div>
      <div class="modal-info-grid">
        <div class="modal-info-item">
          <div class="modal-info-lbl">ที่อยู่</div>
          <div class="modal-info-val" id="modal-addr"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="modal-info-item">
          <div class="modal-info-lbl">โทรศัพท์</div>
          <div class="modal-info-val" id="modal-phone"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="modal-actions" id="modal-actions"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ── FLOATING FOOD BACKGROUND ─────────── -->
<div id="food-bg" aria-hidden="true" style="
  position:fixed;inset:0;
  pointer-events:none;
  z-index:0;
  overflow:hidden;
"></div>

<style>
.food-item{
  position:absolute;
  font-size:32px;
  opacity:.4;
  user-select:none;
  animation:floatFood linear infinite;
  will-change:transform;
}
@keyframes floatFood{
  0%  { transform: translateY(0px)   rotate(0deg)   scale(1); }
  25% { transform: translateY(-18px) rotate(6deg)   scale(1.04); }
  50% { transform: translateY(-8px)  rotate(-4deg)  scale(0.97); }
  75% { transform: translateY(-22px) rotate(5deg)   scale(1.02); }
  100%{ transform: translateY(0px)   rotate(0deg)   scale(1); }
}
</style>

<script>
(function(){
  const EMOJIS = [
    '🍣','🍜','🍕','🍲','🥢','🍴','🥄','🍱','🦞',
    '🍛','🧆','🥟','🍤','🥗','🫕','🍝','🥘','🧇',
    '🍙','🥩','🫙','🍶','🥡','🍥','🧋'
  ];
  const container = document.getElementById('food-bg');
  const COUNT = 28;
  for(let i=0;i<COUNT;i++){
    const el = document.createElement('span');
    el.className = 'food-item';
    el.textContent = EMOJIS[i % EMOJIS.length];
    const left  = Math.random()*98;
    const top   = Math.random()*110 - 5;
    const dur   = 6 + Math.random()*10;
    const delay = -(Math.random()*dur);
    const size  = 24 + Math.random()*22;
    el.style.cssText = `
      left:${left}%;top:${top}%;
      font-size:${size}px;
      animation-duration:${dur}s;
      animation-delay:${delay}s;
    `;
    container.appendChild(el);
  }
})();
</script>
<div class="page">

<!-- ── TOPBAR ──────────────────────────────── -->
<header class="topbar">
  <div class="topbar-brand">
    <div class="ai-dot">AI</div>
    <span class="brand-name">ai<span>-food-</span>assistant</span>
  </div>
  <div class="topbar-meta">
    <span class="meta-item"><strong>ย่านทองหล่อ</strong></span>
    <span class="meta-sep">/</span>
    <span class="meta-item"><strong>7 Jun 2026</strong></span>
    <span class="meta-sep">/</span>
    <span class="meta-item">Prepared by <strong>Genniga Tapaneeyasil</strong></span>
  </div>
</header>

<!-- ── HERO ────────────────────────────────── -->
<section class="hero">
  <div>
    <p class="hero-label">Decision Report · v1.0</p>
    <h1 class="hero-title">AI Food<br><em>Decision</em><br>Report</h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">คัดเลือกร้านอาหารสำหรับ <strong>ทีม 8–12 คน</strong> มื้อเย็นหลังเลิกงาน ย่านทองหล่อ เขตวัฒนา กรุงเทพมหานคร — วิเคราะห์จาก <strong>Google Maps + TripAdvisor</strong> ด้วย 7 ปัจจัยประเมิน</p>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-kpi">
    <div class="kpi-block">
      <div class="kpi-num">20</div>
      <div class="kpi-label">ร้านที่วิเคราะห์</div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi-block">
      <div class="kpi-num" style="color:var(--orange)">3</div>
      <div class="kpi-label">Top Picks</div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi-block">
      <div class="kpi-num">7</div>
      <div class="kpi-label">ปัจจัยประเมิน</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ── 01 TOP RECOMMENDATIONS ──────────────── -->
<div class="sec-header">
  <span class="sec-num">01 ·</span>
  <span class="sec-title">Top Recommendations</span>
  <div class="sec-rule"></div>
  <span class="sec-count">คะแนนรวม ≥ 4.0 / 5.0</span>
</div>

<div class="rec-grid">
  <!-- #1 -->
  <div class="rec-card first">
    <img class="rec-photo" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="ครัวเจียงใหม่ ทองหล่อ">
    <div class="rec-card-body">
      <span class="rec-composite">4.46 / 5.0</span>
      <div class="rec-rank">01</div>
      <div class="rec-name">ครัวเจียงใหม่<br>ทองหล่อ</div>
      <div class="rec-cuisine">THAI · NORTHERN CUISINE</div>
      <div class="rec-score-row">
        <span class="rec-rating">4.8</span>
        <span class="rec-stars">★★★★★</span>
        <span class="rec-reviews">2,765 reviews</span>
      </div>
      <div class="rec-tags">
        <span class="tag tag-orange">รีวิวสูงสุด</span>
        <span class="tag tag-green">ราคาดี</span>
        <span class="tag">แชร์จาน</span>
      </div>
      <p class="rec-reason">รีวิวสะสมมากที่สุดในกลุ่ม บ่งชี้ความเสถียรระยะยาว อาหารไทยเหนือแชร์ได้หลายจาน เหมาะทีมหลากหลาย</p>
      <div class="rec-price">350–500 บาท/หัว</div>
      <div class="rec-phone">+66 99 196 2464</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <!-- #2 -->
  <div class="rec-card second">
    <img class="rec-photo" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="โคซิแร อาหารเกาหลี">
    <div class="rec-card-body">
      <span class="rec-composite">4.07 / 5.0</span>
      <div class="rec-rank">02</div>
      <div class="rec-name">โคซิแร<br>อาหารเกาหลี</div>
      <div class="rec-cuisine">KOREAN · BBQ</div>
      <div class="rec-score-row">
        <span class="rec-rating">4.4</span>
        <span class="rec-stars">★★★★☆</span>
        <span class="rec-reviews">2,740 reviews</span>
      </div>
      <div class="rec-tags">
        <span class="tag tag-green">เตาย่างส่วนตัว</span>
        <span class="tag">บรรยากาศสนุก</span>
      </div>
      <p class="rec-reason">บาร์บีคิวเกาหลีแต่ละโต๊ะมีเตาย่างส่วนตัว ทุกคนกินพร้อมกัน ไม่ต้องรอแชร์ รีวิวสูงยาวนาน</p>
      <div class="rec-price">400–600 บาท/หัว</div>
      <div class="rec-phone">+66 2 714 8683</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <!-- #3 -->
  <div class="rec-card third">
    <img class="rec-photo" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="บ้านไอซ์ สาขา ทองหล่อ">
    <div class="rec-card-body">
      <span class="rec-composite">4.04 / 5.0</span>
      <div class="rec-rank">03</div>
      <div class="rec-name">บ้านไอซ์<br>สาขา ทองหล่อ</div>
      <div class="rec-cuisine">THAI · HOME STYLE</div>
      <div class="rec-score-row">
        <span class="rec-rating">4.6</span>
        <span class="rec-stars">★★★★★</span>
        <span class="rec-reviews">1,996 reviews</span>
      </div>
      <div class="rec-tags">
        <span class="tag tag-green">ราคาดี</span>
        <span class="tag">เมนูหลากหลาย</span>
      </div>
      <p class="rec-reason">Rating สูง รีวิวเกือบ 2,000 เมนูไทยหลากหลาย ราคาเป็นมิตร รองรับกลุ่มได้ดี</p>
      <div class="rec-price">300–450 บาท/หัว</div>
      <div class="rec-phone">+66 64 450 9502</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ── 02 COMPARISON TABLE ──────────────────── -->
<div class="sec-header" style="margin-top:8px">
  <span class="sec-num">02 ·</span>
  <span class="sec-title">Top 3 Comparison</span>
  <div class="sec-rule"></div>
  <span class="sec-count">12 ปัจจัย</span>
</div>

<div style="border:1px solid var(--rule);border-radius:var(--radius);overflow:hidden;overflow-x:auto">
<table id="cmp-table" style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:12px;min-width:620px">
<thead>
  <tr style="background:#e5dbd0">
    <th style="padding:10px 14px;text-align:left;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#8a6e54;border-bottom:1px solid var(--rule);width:160px">ปัจจัย</th>
    <th style="padding:10px 12px;text-align:center;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:#7a3b0e;border-bottom:1px solid var(--rule)">① ครัวเจียงใหม่</th>
    <th style="padding:10px 12px;text-align:center;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:#2d5a8e;border-bottom:1px solid var(--rule)">② โคซิแร</th>
    <th style="padding:10px 12px;text-align:center;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:#3d6b45;border-bottom:1px solid var(--rule)">③ บ้านไอซ์</th>
  </tr>
</thead>
<tbody id="cmp-body"></tbody>
</table>
</div>

<style>
.cmp-sec td{
  background:#f0e9de!important;
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.09em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:#8a6e54;padding:7px 14px;
  font-weight:600;
}
.cmp-row td{
  padding:9px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--rule-2);
  vertical-align:middle;color:#2d1f10;font-size:12px;
  background:#faf6ef;
}
.cmp-row:nth-child(even) td{background:#f7f2ea}
.cmp-row:last-child td{border-bottom:none}
.cmp-row td:first-child{
  color:#8a6e54;font-size:11px;font-weight:500;
  padding-left:14px;
}
.cmp-row:hover td{background:#f0e9de}
.win-badge{
  display:inline-block;padding:1px 7px;border-radius:4px;
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;font-weight:700;
  background:rgba(122,59,14,.1);color:#7a3b0e;
  margin-left:5px;vertical-align:middle;
}
.cbar-wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;justify-content:center}
.cbar{height:5px;width:54px;border-radius:3px;background:#e5dbd0;overflow:hidden;flex-shrink:0}
.cbar-f{height:100%;border-radius:3px}
</style>

<script>
(function(){
const CMP_DATA = [
  {sec:'ข้อมูลพื้นฐาน'},
  {label:'ประเภทอาหาร', v:['อาหารไทยเหนือ','บาร์บีคิวเกาหลี','อาหารไทย']},
  {label:'Google Rating', v:[4.8,4.4,4.6], bar:true, unit:'★', win:0, winLabel:'4.8'},
  {label:'จำนวนรีวิว', v:[2765,2740,1996], bar:true, unit:'', win:0, winLabel:'2,765'},
  {label:'ราคา / หัว (฿)', v:['350–500','400–600','300–450'], win:2, winLabel:'ถูกสุด'},
  {label:'คะแนนรวม', v:[4.46,4.07,4.04], bar:true, unit:'', win:0, winLabel:'4.46'},
  {sec:'ความเหมาะสมสำหรับทีม'},
  {label:'รองรับกลุ่ม 8–12 คน', v:[4,4,4], bar:true, maxV:5, unit:'/5'},
  {label:'เหมาะมื้อเย็นหลังงาน', v:[5,5,5], bar:true, maxV:5, unit:'/5', win:-1, winLabel:'ทุกร้านเต็ม 5/5'},
  {label:'บรรยากาศ', v:['อบอุ่น เป็นกันเอง','สนุก เฮฮา','สบาย ทั่วไป']},
  {label:'ความหลากหลายเมนู', v:['เน้นอาหารเหนือ','เน้นเกาหลี BBQ','หลากหลายสุด'], win:2, winLabel:'หลากหลายสุด'},
  {label:'เหมาะ business dinner', v:['✓ ได้','△ พอได้','✓ ได้']},
  {sec:'ข้อควรระวัง'},
  {label:'ต้องจองล่วงหน้า', v:['⚠ จำเป็น','⚠ จำเป็น','△ แนะนำ']},
  {label:'ข้อจำกัด', v:['พื้นที่แน่นช่วงเย็น','กลิ่นควัน เสียงดัง','บรรยากาศธรรมดา']},
  {label:'โทรศัพท์', v:['099 196 2464','02 714 8683','064 450 9502']},
];

const COLORS = ['#ba7517','#185fa5','#3b6d11'];
const tbody = document.getElementById('cmp-body');

CMP_DATA.forEach(row=>{
  const tr = document.createElement('tr');
  if(row.sec){
    tr.className='cmp-sec';
    tr.innerHTML=`<td colspan="4">${row.sec}</td>`;
  } else {
    tr.className='cmp-row';
    const maxV = row.maxV || (row.bar ? Math.max(...row.v.filter(x=>typeof x==='number')) : 1);
    const cells = row.v.map((v,i)=>{
      const isWin = row.win===i;
      const isAllWin = row.win===-1;
      let content='';
      if(row.bar && typeof v==='number'){
        const pct=Math.round(v/maxV*100);
        content=`<div class="cbar-wrap">
          <div class="cbar"><div class="cbar-f" style="width:${pct}%;background:${COLORS[i]}"></div></div>
          <span style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px">${v}${row.unit||''}</span>
          ${isWin?`<span class="win-badge">${row.winLabel}</span>`:''}
          ${isAllWin&&i===0?`<span class="win-badge">ทุกร้านเต็ม</span>`:''}
        </div>`;
      } else {
        content=`<span>${v}</span>${isWin?`<span class="win-badge">${row.winLabel}</span>`:''}`;
      }
      return `<td style="text-align:center">${content}</td>`;
    });
    tr.innerHTML=`<td>${row.label}</td>${cells.join('')}`;
  }
  tbody.appendChild(tr);
});
})();
</script>

<!-- ── 03 FULL TABLE ─────────────────────────── -->
<div class="sec-header" style="margin-top:8px">
  <span class="sec-num">03 ·</span>
  <span class="sec-title">Full Analysis Table</span>
  <div class="sec-rule"></div>
  <span class="sec-count">20 restaurants</span>
</div>

<div class="filter-strip">
  <button class="fb on" onclick="ft('all',this)">ALL</button>
  <button class="fb" onclick="ft('rec',this)">แนะนำ ✓</button>
  <button class="fb" onclick="ft('con',this)">พิจารณา</button>
  <button class="fb" onclick="ft('no',this)">ไม่แนะนำ</button>
  <button class="fb" onclick="ft('thai',this)">ไทย</button>
  <button class="fb" onclick="ft('kor',this)">เกาหลี</button>
  <button class="fb" onclick="ft('jpn',this)">ญี่ปุ่น</button>
  <button class="fb" onclick="ft('west',this)">ตะวันตก</button>
</div>

<div class="tbl-wrap">
<table id="main-table">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th style="text-align:left;padding-left:14px">RESTAURANT</th>
      <th>CUISINE</th>
      <th>RATING</th>
      <th>REVIEWS</th>
      <th>GROUP</th>
      <th>DINNER</th>
      <th>PRICE</th>
      <th>COMPOSITE</th>
      <th>STATUS</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody id="tbody"></tbody>
</table>
</div>

<!-- ── 03 FACTOR ANALYSIS ───────────────────── -->
<div class="sec-header">
  <span class="sec-num">04 ·</span>
  <span class="sec-title">Factor Analysis</span>
  <div class="sec-rule"></div>
  <span class="sec-count">Top 8 per factor</span>
</div>

<div class="factor-grid" id="factor-grid"></div>

<!-- ── 05 METHODOLOGY ───────────────────────── -->
<div class="sec-header">
  <span class="sec-num">05 ·</span>
  <span class="sec-title">Methodology</span>
  <div class="sec-rule"></div>
  <span class="sec-count">3 หมวด</span>
</div>

<div class="method-grid">
  <!-- Data Collection -->
  <div class="method-card">
    <div class="method-card-head">
      <div class="method-icon" style="background:rgba(122,59,14,.12)">🗃️</div>
      <h3>Data Collection</h3>
    </div>
    <div class="method-step">
      <span class="ms-num" style="background:rgba(122,59,14,.15);color:var(--orange)">1</span>
      <span class="ms-text"><strong>Google Maps Crawler</strong> — ใช้ Apify actor ดึงข้อมูลร้านอาหารในย่านทองหล่อ 20 ร้าน คอลัมน์: title, totalScore, reviewsCount, categoryName, street, phone, website</span>
    </div>
    <div class="method-step">
      <span class="ms-num" style="background:rgba(122,59,14,.15);color:var(--orange)">2</span>
      <span class="ms-text"><strong>TripAdvisor Scraper</strong> — ดึงข้อมูลเพิ่มเติม rating, numberOfReviews, priceRange, rankingString (พบว่า dataset มาจากอียิปต์ ไม่ตรง scope)</span>
    </div>
    <div class="method-step">
      <span class="ms-num" style="background:rgba(122,59,14,.15);color:var(--orange)">3</span>
      <span class="ms-text"><strong>Secondary Research</strong> — ค้นคว้าข้อมูลเพิ่มเติมจาก Facebook, Instagram, Google Search สำหรับร้านที่ข้อมูลดิบไม่ครบ</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Scoring Framework -->
  <div class="method-card">
    <div class="method-card-head">
      <div class="method-icon" style="background:rgba(61,107,69,.12)">📐</div>
      <h3>Scoring Framework</h3>
    </div>
    <div class="method-step">
      <span class="ms-num" style="background:rgba(61,107,69,.15);color:var(--green)">1</span>
      <span class="ms-text"><strong>Rating Score (1–5)</strong> — normalize จาก Google rating 4.0–5.0 เป็น scale 1–5 ด้วย linear transform</span>
    </div>
    <div class="method-step">
      <span class="ms-num" style="background:rgba(61,107,69,.15);color:var(--green)">2</span>
      <span class="ms-text"><strong>Review Score (1–5)</strong> — normalize review count โดยใช้ max(2,765) เป็น benchmark 5 คะแนน</span>
    </div>
    <div class="method-step">
      <span class="ms-num" style="background:rgba(61,107,69,.15);color:var(--green)">3</span>
      <span class="ms-text"><strong>Composite Score</strong> — Popularity = Rating×40% + Review×60%, คะแนนรวม = 6 ปัจจัยแบบ weighted sum</span>
    </div>
    <div class="method-step">
      <span class="ms-num" style="background:rgba(61,107,69,.15);color:var(--green)">4</span>
      <span class="ms-text"><strong>Manual Assessment</strong> — Group Capacity, Dinner Suitability ประเมินจากการค้นคว้าเพิ่มเติมและ expert judgment</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Selection Criteria -->
  <div class="method-card">
    <div class="method-card-head">
      <div class="method-icon" style="background:rgba(45,90,142,.12)">🎯</div>
      <h3>Selection Criteria</h3>
    </div>
    <div class="method-step">
      <span class="ms-num" style="background:rgba(45,90,142,.15);color:var(--blue)">1</span>
      <span class="ms-text"><strong>โจทย์หลัก</strong> — ทีม 8–12 คน มื้อเย็นหลังเลิกงาน ราคาเหมาะสม บรรยากาศดี ไม่เป็นทางการเกินไป</span>
    </div>
    <div class="method-step">
      <span class="ms-num" style="background:rgba(45,90,142,.15);color:var(--blue)">2</span>
      <span class="ms-text"><strong>เกณฑ์คัดออก</strong> — ร้านที่ปิดก่อน 18:00, บาร์-คลับที่ไม่เหมาะ team dinner, คาเฟ่ที่เน้นมื้อเช้า-กลางวัน</span>
    </div>
    <div class="method-step">
      <span class="ms-num" style="background:rgba(45,90,142,.15);color:var(--blue)">3</span>
      <span class="ms-text"><strong>Threshold</strong> — คะแนนรวม ≥ 4.0 = แนะนำ, 3.5–3.9 = พิจารณา, 3.0–3.4 = ลำดับรอง, &lt;3.0 = ไม่แนะนำ</span>
    </div>
    <div class="method-step">
      <span class="ms-num" style="background:rgba(45,90,142,.15);color:var(--blue)">4</span>
      <span class="ms-text"><strong>Tie-breaking</strong> — หากคะแนนเท่ากัน ใช้ review count เป็น tiebreaker เพราะสะท้อนความนิยมระยะยาว</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ── 06 AI WORKFLOW ─────────────────────── -->
<div class="sec-header" style="margin-top:8px">
  <span class="sec-num">06 ·</span>
  <span class="sec-title">AI Workflow</span>
  <div class="sec-rule"></div>
  <span class="sec-count">4 steps</span>
</div>

<div class="workflow-wrap">
  <div class="workflow-track">

    <div class="wf-node active">
      <div class="wf-dot">🌐</div>
      <div class="wf-label">Data<br>Crawling</div>
      <div class="wf-desc">ดึงข้อมูลร้านจาก Google Maps &amp; TripAdvisor ทองหล่อ 20 ร้าน</div>
      <div class="wf-tool">Apify</div>
    </div>
    <div class="wf-arrow">→</div>

    <div class="wf-node active">
      <div class="wf-dot">📂</div>
      <div class="wf-label">Export &amp;<br>Upload CSV</div>
      <div class="wf-desc">Export เป็น CSV 2 ไฟล์ แล้ว Upload เข้า Claude โดยตรง</div>
      <div class="wf-tool">CSV · Claude</div>
    </div>
    <div class="wf-arrow">→</div>

    <div class="wf-node active">
      <div class="wf-dot">🤖</div>
      <div class="wf-label">AI Analysis<br>&amp; Cleaning</div>
      <div class="wf-desc">วิเคราะห์ 7 ปัจจัย ทำความสะอาดข้อมูล คำนวณ composite score จัดอันดับ</div>
      <div class="wf-tool">Claude AI</div>
    </div>
    <div class="wf-arrow">→</div>

    <div class="wf-node active">
      <div class="wf-dot">📄</div>
      <div class="wf-label">Report<br>Generation</div>
      <div class="wf-desc">สร้าง Excel + HTML report พร้อม visualization และ score calculator</div>
      <div class="wf-tool">Claude AI</div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>

<!-- ── 07 LIMITATIONS ────────────────────── -->
<div class="sec-header">
  <span class="sec-num">07 ·</span>
  <span class="sec-title">Limitations</span>
  <div class="sec-rule"></div>
  <span class="sec-count">6 ข้อจำกัด</span>
</div>

<div class="limit-grid">
  <div class="limit-item">
    <div class="limit-badge" style="background:var(--red-l)">🗺️</div>
    <div class="limit-body">
      <h4>TripAdvisor Dataset ผิดพื้นที่</h4>
      <p>ข้อมูล TripAdvisor ที่ Crawl มาทั้งหมด 20 แถวมาจาก 10th of Ramadan City อียิปต์ ทำให้ไม่สามารถ cross-validate กับ Google Maps ได้เลย</p>
      <div class="limit-suggest">→ แนะนำ: ตั้ง location filter ใน Apify actor ให้ชัดเจนก่อน run</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="limit-item">
    <div class="limit-badge" style="background:var(--amber-l)">👁️</div>
    <div class="limit-body">
      <h4>ไม่มีข้อมูล Seating Capacity จริง</h4>
      <p>จำนวนที่นั่งและการรองรับกลุ่ม 8–12 คนประเมินจาก expert judgment และ secondary research ไม่ใช่ข้อมูลโดยตรงจากร้าน</p>
      <div class="limit-suggest">→ แนะนำ: โทรยืนยันก่อนจองทุกครั้ง</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="limit-item">
    <div class="limit-badge" style="background:var(--amber-l)">📅</div>
    <div class="limit-body">
      <h4>ข้อมูล ณ วันที่ 7 Jun 2026 เท่านั้น</h4>
      <p>ราคา เวลาเปิด เมนู และคุณภาพอาหารอาจเปลี่ยนแปลงได้ตลอดเวลา รายงานนี้สะท้อนสถานะ ณ วันที่ Crawl เท่านั้น</p>
      <div class="limit-suggest">→ แนะนำ: Re-run Apify ทุก 30–60 วันเพื่ออัปเดต</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="limit-item">
    <div class="limit-badge" style="background:var(--red-l)">⭐</div>
    <div class="limit-body">
      <h4>Review Bias และ Fake Reviews</h4>
      <p>Google Maps rating และ review count อาจมี bias จาก fake reviews, incentivized reviews หรือ review bombing คะแนนสูงไม่เสมอไปหมายถึงคุณภาพจริง</p>
      <div class="limit-suggest">→ แนะนำ: ดู review sentiment ควบคู่กับ rating</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="limit-item">
    <div class="limit-badge" style="background:var(--green-l)">🔢</div>
    <div class="limit-body">
      <h4>Sample Size เล็ก (20 ร้าน)</h4>
      <p>วิเคราะห์เพียง 20 ร้านในย่านทองหล่อ ยังมีร้านอีกจำนวนมากที่ไม่ได้อยู่ใน dataset ผล ranking อาจเปลี่ยนได้หากเพิ่มข้อมูล</p>
      <div class="limit-suggest">→ แนะนำ: ขยาย dataset ให้ครอบคลุม 50–100 ร้าน</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="limit-item">
    <div class="limit-badge" style="background:var(--blue-l)">🧮</div>
    <div class="limit-body">
      <h4>Subjectivity ของ Weight</h4>
      <p>น้ำหนักแต่ละปัจจัย (เช่น Group 20%, Price 15%) ถูกกำหนดตาม judgment ของผู้วิเคราะห์ ทีมต่างกันอาจให้ความสำคัญต่างกัน</p>
      <div class="limit-suggest">→ แนะนำ: ใช้ Score Calculator ปรับ weight ตามความต้องการทีม</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ── 08 DATA QUALITY LOG ──────────────────── -->
<div class="sec-header">
  <span class="sec-num">08 ·</span>
  <span class="sec-title">Data Quality Log</span>

  <span class="sec-count">9 issues detected</span>
</div>

   addr:"97-99 ถ.ทองหล่อ เขตวัฒนา กรุงเทพฯ", phone:"+66 2 714 8683", web:"https://www.facebook.com/kosiraeofficial/", maps:"https://maps.google.com/?q=โคซิแร+ทองหล่อ", detail:"บาร์บีคิวเกาหลีแต่ละโต๊ะมีเตาย่างส่วนตัว ทุกคนกินพร้อมกัน บรรยากาศสนุก รีวิว 2,740 รายการ"},

  {n:16,name:"UpperDeck by NangKwak",        cui:"ทั่วไป",tag:"Other", rt:4.9,rv:69,  gr:3,dn:4,pr:3,pe:"500–800",  cp:3.19,st:"sec",
   addr:"137/1 อาคาร The Thirdplace ชั้น 3 ทองหล่อ", phone:"+66 2 714 7938", web:"https://www.thirdplacebkk.com/upperdeck/", maps:"https://maps.google.com/?q=UpperDeck+NangKwak+Thonglor", detail:"Rooftop restaurant วิวสวย rating 4.9 แต่รีวิวน้อย (69) ยังใหม่"},
  {n:17,name:"ทองสิบ ข้าวต้ม & บาร์",       cui:"ไทย",  tag:"Thai",  rt:5.0,rv:42,  gr:3,dn:4,pr:4,pe:"250–400",  cp:3.44,st:"sec",
   addr:"137/1 ซอยทองหล่อ 10", phone:"+66 92 372 7288", web:"", maps:"https://maps.google.com/?q=ทองสิบ+ข้าวต้ม+ทองหล่อ", detail:"ข้าวต้มไทย บรรยากาศบาร์ เปิดดึก rating 5.0 แต่รีวิวน้อยมาก (42)"},
  {n:18,name:"ออเดรย์ คาเฟ่ แอนด์ บิสโตร", cui:"คาเฟ่",tag:"Cafe",  rt:4.2,rv:1178,gr:3,dn:3,pr:4,pe:"250–400",  cp:2.80,st:"no",
   addr:"ซอยทองหล่อ 11 เขตวัฒนา", phone:"+66 2 712 6667", web:"http://www.audreygroup.com/", maps:"https://maps.google.com/?q=ออเดรย์+คาเฟ่+ทองหล่อ", detail:"คาเฟ่บิสโตร บรรยากาศดี แต่ไม่เหมาะมื้อเย็นกลุ่มใหญ่"},
  {n:19,name:"BARTELS Thonglor",             cui:"คาเฟ่",tag:"Cafe",  rt:4.7,rv:1006,gr:2,dn:2,pr:4,pe:"200–350",  cp:2.84,st:"no",
   addr:"Market Place 323 ถ.ทองหล่อ", phone:"+66 61 710 8448", web:"https://bartelsthailand.com/", maps:"https://maps.google.com/?q=BARTELS+Thonglor", detail:"คาเฟ่เน้นมื้อเช้า-กลางวัน ปิดก่อนเย็น ไม่เหมาะ team dinner"},
  {n:20,name:"CALES Thonglor",               cui:"บาร์", tag:"Bar",   rt:5.0,rv:137, gr:3,dn:2,pr:2,pe:"600–1200+",cp:2.75,st:"no",
   addr:"888 ถ.ทองหล่อ เขตวัฒนา", phone:"065 878 2424", web:"", maps:"https://maps.google.com/?q=CALES+Thonglor+Bangkok", detail:"Social Club บาร์-ผับ ธีม Circus เน้น DJ เสียงดัง ไม่เหมาะ team dinner"},
];

const maxRv=2765;

function bar(v,max,clr){
  const p=Math.round(v/max*100);
  return `<div class="bar-cell"><div class="bar"><div class="bar-f" style="width:${p}%;background:${clr}"></div></div><span class="bv">${typeof v==='number'&&v%1!==0?v.toFixed(1):v.toLocaleString()}</span></div>`;
}
function rkBadge(n){
  const c=n===1?'rk1':n===2?'rk2':n===3?'rk3':'rkn';
  return `<span class="rk ${c}">${n}</span>`;
}
function stPill(s){
  if(s==='rec') return '<span class="sp sp-rec">แนะนำ ✓</span>';
  if(s==='con') return '<span class="sp sp-con">พิจารณา</span>';
  if(s==='sec') return '<span class="sp sp-sec">ลำดับรอง</span>';
  return '<span class="sp sp-no">ไม่แนะนำ ✗</span>';
}
function prDots(p){
  const filled='฿'.repeat(p);
  const empty='<span style="opacity:.2">'+'฿'.repeat(5-p)+'</span>';
  const c=p>=4?'p1':p>=3?'p2':'p3';
  return `<span class="ptag ${c}">${filled}${empty}</span>`;
}
function cpColor(c){
  return c>=4?'#4a7c59':c>=3.5?'#3d6b8e':c>=3?'#a0622a':'#a03030';
}

let cur='all';
function renderTable(f){
  const map={all:()=>true,rec:r=>r.st==='rec',con:r=>r.st==='con',no:r=>r.st==='no'||r.st==='sec',
    thai:r=>r.tag==='Thai',kor:r=>r.tag==='Korean',jpn:r=>r.tag==='Jpn',west:r=>r.tag==='West'};
  const rows=R.filter(map[f]||map.all);
  document.getElementById('tbody').innerHTML=rows.map(r=>`
    <tr class="${r.n<=3?'top':''}">
      <td>${rkBadge(r.n)}<strong>${r.name}</strong></td>
      <td style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted)">${r.cui}</td>
      <td>${bar(r.rt,5,'#a0622a')}</td>
      <td>${bar(r.rv,maxRv,'#4a7c59')}</td>
      <td>${bar(r.gr,5,'#3d6b8e')}</td>
      <td>${bar(r.dn,5,'#a03030')}</td>
      <td>${prDots(r.pr)}</td>
      <td><strong style="color:${cpColor(r.cp)};font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px">${r.cp.toFixed(2)}</strong></td>
      <td>${stPill(r.st)}</td>
    </tr>`).join('');
}
function ft(f,btn){
  cur=f;
  document.querySelectorAll('.fb').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('on'));
  btn.classList.add('on');
  renderTable(f);
}
renderTable('all');

/* ─── FACTORS ──────────────────────────────── */
const FACTORS=[
  {label:'Rating',    desc:'Google Maps score',   key:'rt', max:5,    clr:'#a0622a',icon:'⭐'},
  {label:'Reviews',   desc:'Popularity by volume', key:'rv', max:2765, clr:'#4a7c59',icon:'💬'},
  {label:'กลุ่ม',     desc:'รองรับ 8–12 คน',       key:'gr', max:5,    clr:'#3d6b8e',icon:'👥'},
  {label:'มื้อเย็น',  desc:'เหมาะหลังเลิกงาน',     key:'dn', max:5,    clr:'#a03030',icon:'🌙'},
  {label:'ราคา',      desc:'คะแนนความคุ้มค่า',      key:'pr', max:5,    clr:'#6b4c1e',icon:'💰'},
];
const fg=document.getElementById('factor-grid');
FACTORS.forEach(f=>{
  const sorted=[...R].sort((a,b)=>b[f.key]-a[f.key]).slice(0,6);
  const mx=sorted[0][f.key];
  fg.innerHTML+=`<div class="fc">
    <div class="fc-head"><span class="fc-icon">${f.icon}</span><span class="fc-label">${f.label}</span></div>
    <p class="fc-desc">${f.desc}</p>
    ${sorted.map((r,i)=>`<div class="fc-row">
      <span class="fc-name">${i===0?'<span class="top1-tag">1st</span>':''}<span style="font-size:9px">${r.name.slice(0,14)}${r.name.length>14?'…':''}</span></span>
      <div class="fc-track"><div class="fc-fill" style="width:${Math.round(r[f.key]/mx*100)}%;background:${f.clr}"></div></div>
      <span class="fc-val">${typeof r[f.key]==='number'&&r[f.key]%1!==0?r[f.key].toFixed(1):r[f.key].toLocaleString()}</span>
    </div>`).join('')}
  </div>`;
});

/* ─── DQ LOG ───────────────────────────────── */
const DQ=[
  {sev:'H',src:'TripAdvisor',title:'Out-of-scope data',desc:'ข้อมูลทั้ง 20 แถวมาจาก 10th of Ramadan City อียิปต์ — ไม่ตรงกับทองหล่อ ไม่สามารถ join ได้'},
  {sev:'H',src:'TripAdvisor',title:'Missing priceRange 100%',desc:'ทุกแถวไม่มีข้อมูลระดับราคา ไม่สามารถเปรียบเทียบราคาจาก TripAdvisor ได้เลย'},
  {sev:'H',src:'ทั้งสอง',    title:'Cross-match ไม่ได้',    desc:'ไม่มีร้านที่ตรงกันระหว่าง 2 แหล่ง เนื่องจาก TripAdvisor ใช้พื้นที่ต่างประเทศ'},
  {sev:'M',src:'TripAdvisor',title:'Missing rating 40%',    desc:'8 จาก 20 แถวไม่มีคะแนน rating ทำให้ analysis จาก TA ไม่สมบูรณ์'},
  {sev:'M',src:'Google Maps',title:'Low review count (5 ร้าน)',desc:'ทองสิบ=42, UpperDeck=69 รีวิวน้อยเกินไป ข้อมูลยังไม่เพียงพอ'},
  {sev:'M',src:'Google Maps',title:'Venue type mismatch',   desc:'CALES และ BARTELS ถูก tag เป็น "ร้านอาหาร" ทั้งที่จริงคือบาร์-คลับ และคาเฟ่กลางวัน'},
  {sev:'L',src:'Google Maps',title:'Missing website 30%',   desc:'6 ร้านไม่มีเว็บไซต์ ยืนยันข้อมูลเพิ่มเติมได้ยาก'},
  {sev:'L',src:'TripAdvisor',title:'Missing rankingString', desc:'8 แถวไม่มีข้อมูล ranking — ไม่กระทบ analysis หลัก'},
  {sev:'L',src:'Google Maps',title:'Category columns ส่วนใหญ่ว่าง',desc:'categories/1–/7 ว่างสำหรับร้านส่วนใหญ่ ใช้ categoryName แทน'},
];
const sevMap={H:{cls:'dq-h',lbl:'HIGH'},M:{cls:'dq-m',lbl:'MED'},L:{cls:'dq-l',lbl:'LOW'}};
const dql=document.getElementById('dq-log');
DQ.forEach(d=>{
  const s=sevMap[d.sev];
  dql.innerHTML+=`<div class="dq-row">
    <div class="dq-badge ${s.cls}">${s.lbl}</div>
    <div style="flex:1">
      <div class="dq-title">${d.title}</div>
      <div class="dq-desc">${d.desc}</div>
    </div>
    <span class="dq-src">${d.src}</span>
  </div>`;
});

/* ─── MODAL ──────────────────────────────────── */
const PHOTO_QUERIES = {
  "ครัวเจียงใหม่ - ทองหล่อ": ["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/p/AF1QipNFtlkSZTmwqH3DsN7Qb3ikjxGlkJkMNJD0r-s=s1360-w1360-h1020","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/p/AF1QipMCXiGnWzyvBk_7NjnLTrMDJNqX-i8Jl0E7kLo=s1360-w1360-h1020"],
  "โคซิแร อาหารเกาหลี": ["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/p/AF1QipPh-Kl6xVp1r0KFYfmVBl7MnVvwYa1fFgUKWRM=s1360-w1360-h1020"],
};

const STATUS_LABEL = {rec:'แนะนำ ✓',con:'พิจารณา',sec:'ลำดับรอง',no:'ไม่แนะนำ'};
const STATUS_COLOR = {rec:'#3d6b45',con:'#2d5a8e',sec:'#8a6e54',no:'#a03030'};

function cpColorHex(c){return c>=4?'#3d6b45':c>=3.5?'#2d5a8e':c>=3?'#a0622a':'#a03030';}

function starsStr(rt){
  const full=Math.round(rt);
  return '★'.repeat(full)+'☆'.repeat(5-full);
}

function openModal(r){
  document.getElementById('modal-name').textContent = r.name;
  document.getElementById('modal-cuisine').textContent = r.cui + ' · ' + r.tag;
  document.getElementById('modal-rating').textContent = r.rt.toFixed(1);
  document.getElementById('modal-stars').textContent = starsStr(r.rt);
  document.getElementById('modal-reviews').textContent = r.rv.toLocaleString();
  document.getElementById('modal-composite').innerHTML = `<span style="color:${cpColorHex(r.cp)}">${r.cp.toFixed(2)}</span>`;
  document.getElementById('modal-price').textContent = r.pe + ' ฿';
  document.getElementById('modal-detail').textContent = r.detail || '';
  document.getElementById('modal-addr').textContent = r.addr || '—';
  document.getElementById('modal-phone').textContent = r.phone || '—';

  // rank badge
  const existing = document.querySelector('.modal-rank-badge');
  if(existing) existing.remove();
  if(r.n<=3){
    const badge = document.createElement('div');
    badge.className='modal-rank-badge';
    badge.textContent='0'+r.n;
    document.getElementById('modal-photos').appendChild(badge);
  }

  // actions
  const actions = document.getElementById('modal-actions');
  actions.innerHTML = '';

  // Google Maps
  if(r.maps){
    const a=document.createElement('a');
    a.className='modal-btn modal-btn-primary';
    a.href=r.maps; a.target='_blank'; a.rel='noopener';
    a.innerHTML='📍 Google Maps';
    actions.appendChild(a);
  }

  // Google Search — หน้าร้านจริง
  const gSearch = document.createElement('a');
  gSearch.className='modal-btn';
  gSearch.href=`https://www.google.com/search?q=${encodeURIComponent(r.name+' ทองหล่อ กรุงเทพ')}`;
  gSearch.target='_blank'; gSearch.rel='noopener';
  gSearch.innerHTML='🔍 ค้นหาร้านบน Google';
  actions.appendChild(gSearch);

  // Google Images
  const gImg = document.createElement('a');
  gImg.className='modal-btn';
  gImg.href=`https://www.google.com/search?q=${encodeURIComponent(r.name+' ทองหล่อ')}&tbm=isch`;
  gImg.target='_blank'; gImg.rel='noopener';
  gImg.innerHTML='🖼️ ดูรูปภาพร้าน';
  actions.appendChild(gImg);

  // Website
  if(r.web){
    const a=document.createElement('a');
    a.className='modal-btn';
    a.href=r.web; a.target='_blank'; a.rel='noopener';
    a.innerHTML='🌐 เว็บไซต์';
    actions.appendChild(a);
  }

  // Phone
  if(r.phone){
    const a=document.createElement('a');
    a.className='modal-btn';
    a.href='tel:'+r.phone.replace(/\s/g,'');
    a.innerHTML='📞 '+r.phone;
    actions.appendChild(a);
  }

  // status pill
  const pill=document.createElement('span');
  pill.style.cssText=`font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;padding:6px 14px;border-radius:6px;background:rgba(122,59,14,.08);color:${STATUS_COLOR[r.st]};border:1px solid currentColor;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;margin-left:auto`;
  pill.textContent=STATUS_LABEL[r.st]||r.st;
  actions.appendChild(pill);

  // photos
  loadPhotos(r);

  document.getElementById('modal-overlay').classList.add('open');
  document.body.style.overflow='hidden';
}

/* ── REAL PHOTO URLs per restaurant ─────── */
const PHOTOS = {
  1: 'data:image/jpeg;base64,',
  2: 'data:image/jpeg;base64,',
  3: 'data:image/jpeg;base64,',
};

const UNSPLASH_FOOD = {
  'Thai':   ['thai-food-Bangkok','pad-thai-restaurant','thai-cuisine-dish'],
  'Korean': ['korean-bbq-grill','korean-food-restaurant','korean-galbi'],
  'Jpn':    ['japanese-sushi-restaurant','ramen-noodles-Japan','izakaya-Japan'],
  'West':   ['italian-pasta-restaurant','mediterranean-food','pizza-restaurant'],
  'Cafe':   ['cafe-brunch-coffee','bakery-cafe-food','brunch-restaurant'],
  'Bar':    ['cocktail-bar-lounge','nightlife-restaurant','bar-drinks'],
  'Other':  ['rooftop-restaurant-Bangkok','fine-dining-Bangkok','Bangkok-restaurant-food'],
};

function loadPhotos(r){
  const photos = document.getElementById('modal-photos');
  photos.querySelectorAll('img,.photo-placeholder,.photo-note').forEach(el=>el.remove());

  const hasReal = !!PHOTOS[r.n];

  // Main image
  const mainImg = document.createElement('img');
  mainImg.className = 'modal-photo-main';
  mainImg.alt = r.name;

  if(hasReal){
    mainImg.src = PHOTOS[r.n];
    photos.insertBefore(mainImg, photos.querySelector('.modal-rank-badge') || null);
    // side photos from unsplash
    const tags = UNSPLASH_FOOD[r.tag] || UNSPLASH_FOOD['Other'];
    const seeds = [r.n*17+3, r.n*11+7];
    const side = document.createElement('div');
    side.className = 'modal-photo-side';
    [0,1].forEach(i=>{
      const img = document.createElement('img');
      img.alt = r.name + ' ' + (i+1);
      img.src = `https://source.unsplash.com/280x218/?${encodeURIComponent(tags[i]||tags[0])}&sig=${seeds[i]}`;
      img.onerror = () => img.style.cssText='background:var(--bg3);flex:1;display:block';
      side.appendChild(img);
    });
    photos.appendChild(side);
  } else {
    const tags = UNSPLASH_FOOD[r.tag] || UNSPLASH_FOOD['Other'];
    const seeds = [r.n*17+3, r.n*11+7, r.n*5+13];
    mainImg.src = `https://source.unsplash.com/600x440/?${encodeURIComponent(tags[0])}&sig=${seeds[0]}`;
    mainImg.onerror = () => mainImg.replaceWith(makePlaceholder(r));
    photos.insertBefore(mainImg, photos.querySelector('.modal-rank-badge') || null);
    const side = document.createElement('div');
    side.className = 'modal-photo-side';
    [1,2].forEach(i=>{
      const img = document.createElement('img');
      img.alt = r.name + ' ' + i;
      img.src = `https://source.unsplash.com/280x218/?${encodeURIComponent(tags[i%tags.length])}&sig=${seeds[i]}`;
      img.onerror = () => img.style.cssText='background:var(--bg3);flex:1;display:block';
      side.appendChild(img);
    });
    photos.appendChild(side);
    // note for non-real photos
    const note = document.createElement('div');
    note.className = 'photo-note';
    note.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;bottom:8px;left:8px;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;background:rgba(250,246,239,.85);color:#8a6e54;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:4px;pointer-events:none';
    note.textContent = '📸 ตัวอย่างภาพ · กด "ดูรูปภาพร้าน" เพื่อดูรูปจริง';
    photos.appendChild(note);
  }
}

function makePlaceholder(r){
  const div=document.createElement('div');
  div.className='photo-placeholder';
  const emojiMap={Thai:'🍜',Korean:'🥩',Jpn:'🍣',West:'🍕',Cafe:'☕',Bar:'🍹',Other:'🍽️'};
  div.innerHTML=`<span style="font-size:52px">${emojiMap[r.tag]||'🍽️'}</span><span>${r.name}</span>`;
  return div;
}

function closeModal(){
  document.getElementById('modal-overlay').classList.remove('open');
  document.body.style.overflow='';
}
function closeModalOverlay(e){
  if(e.target===document.getElementById('modal-overlay')) closeModal();
}
document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{ if(e.key==='Escape') closeModal(); });

/* make rec-cards clickable */
document.querySelectorAll('.rec-card').forEach(card=>{
  const nameEl = card.querySelector('.rec-name');
  if(!nameEl) return;
  const rawName = nameEl.textContent.replace(/\n/g,' ').trim();
  card.addEventListener('click', ()=>{
    const r = R.find(x=> rawName.includes(x.name.split(' ')[0]) || x.name.includes(rawName.split('\n')[0].trim()));
    if(r) openModal(r);
  });
});

/* make table rows clickable — delegated */
document.getElementById('main-table').addEventListener('click', e=>{
  const tr = e.target.closest('tbody tr');
  if(!tr) return;
  const nameEl = tr.querySelector('strong');
  if(!nameEl) return;
  const name = nameEl.textContent.trim();
  const r = R.find(x=>x.name===name);
  if(r) openModal(r);
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
